hours.descrp: View activity by hour of day
hours.daysOption: Number of days to aggregate (default: 7, max: 90)

setup.day: Day for digest (0-6 for weekly = Sun-Sat, 1-28 for monthly)

overview.title: Server Overview — Today
overview.noData: No activity data recorded yet. Analytics will start collecting once enabled.

setup.enabled: Analytics have been **enabled** for this server. Data collection will begin now.
setup.disabled: Analytics have been **disabled**. Existing data is preserved.
setup.channelCleared: Digest channel has been cleared. No digests will be sent.
setup.invalidDay: Invalid day value. Use 0-6 for weekly (Sun-Sat) or 1-28 for monthly.

errors.notEnabled: Analytics are not enabled for this server. An admin can enable them with `/insights setup`.
errors.noPermission: You need Administrator permission to manage analytics settings.
